data_quality.note: 14 of 41 fetched competitors have >50% reply contamination, inflating or deflating their engagement rates. Affected accounts: JosephinaM3131 (100% replies, market=EN), ai_hiyo_ (70% replies, market=EN), PinUpGirl_AI (70% replies, market=both), LeahSunkissed (100% replies, market=EN), Ava_starz (60% replies, market=EN), AI_MIKENEKO (70% replies, market=JP), BoobistR (80% replies, market=JP), ai_nontan_room (60% replies, market=JP), tororo_223 (90% replies, market=JP), hakoirikumatan (100% replies, market=JP), 2nd_karen_AI (100% replies, market=JP), seisei_ai_1st (60% replies, market=JP), Shizuku_AItuber (100% replies, market=JP), nene__chandayo (90% replies, market=JP). Their raw engagement rates are unreliable; reply-adjusted rates should be used instead.

EN.note: Impression-based rates for IvoryLane_plus (15.84) are outliers -- likely due to low impression counts on sampled tweets or API data anomalies.

JP.note: JP market engagement data is consistent with no major outliers.

trending_adjusted.threshold_method: mean + 2*stddev of all sampled tweet likes

trending_posts.text_preview: be honest.. am I attractive? https://t.co/OgZpH6S3V3
Rate my body shape from 1-10 🤍 https://t.co/NqYhAIzDUg

hashtag_signal.observation: 90.2% of competitors (37/41) use zero hashtags in their last 10 posts
hashtag_signal.implication: Top performers in this niche rely on visual content quality and algorithmic discovery rather than hashtag reach. Hashtags are not a significant growth driver in AI beauty.
hashtag_signal.recommendation: Limit hashtag usage to 2-3 niche-specific tags maximum; avoid hashtag-heavy strategies. Focus effort on image quality and engagement-bait captions instead.

executive_summary: EN Market: Strong engagement diversity across 26 competitors. Top performers by reply-adjusted rate: sessypuuh (38.0% adjusted ER, 7,678 followers), yuumispm (25.9% adjusted ER, 12,045 followers), leahyunaxo (8.4% adjusted ER, 75,549 followers). Impression-based engagement averages 4.9% -- significantly higher than follower-based rates (4.8%), indicating that even large accounts like Estherbron1 (1,240,269 followers) reach far beyond their follower base via algorithmic distribution.

EN Market: Viral content follows a clear pattern -- short, question-based or provocative captions paired with AI-generated images drive massive engagement. Trending posts include: leahyunaxo (35,928 likes: "wifey material? https://t.co/vZjBtRDcHR"); leahyunaxo (16,243 likes: "be honest.. am I attractive? https://t.co/OgZpH6S3"); yuumispm (16,182 likes: "https://t.co/rIVhO4kg9z"). This engagement-bait style with minimal text dominates the EN niche.

JP Market: 17 competitors tracked with avg 0.44% reply-adjusted engagement. Top performers: ai_hyk (1.8% adjusted ER, 124,114 followers), BoobistR (1.5% adjusted ER, 20,880 followers), yunaelegant (1.1% adjusted ER, 20,535 followers). JP market shows lower follower-based engagement but higher impression-based rates (8.8%), suggesting strong algorithmic reach for quality content.

JP Market: Reply contamination is particularly high in JP -- several accounts (hakoirikumatan 100%, 2nd_karen_AI 100%, Shizuku_AItuber 100%, tororo_223 90%, nene__chandayo 90%) post almost exclusively replies, making their follower-based engagement rates near zero. Impression-based rates reveal their true reach is much higher.

Hashtag absence is a strong signal: 90.2% of competitors use zero hashtags in their last 10 posts. Only 4 accounts use hashtags at all (NotjustRen00, ai_nontan_room, AIart_yama94, seisei_ai_1st). The few hashtags used (#SFW, #Fictional, #digitalart) are JP-market-specific. EN market success relies entirely on visual content quality and algorithmic discovery.

New accounts: 29 quality accounts discovered from 54 raw results (filtered by 500+ followers). Notable high-follower discoveries: 18pornfamily (196,943), asian_08_ (151,575), Jinzo1993 (118,842), NotoriousLad2 (115,780), FutaQueens_ (107,510). These accounts are active in AI beauty keyword spaces and worth monitoring.
